# ATS Resume Checker — llms.txt
# https://atsresumechecker.co.in

## About
ATS Resume Checker is an Indian resume writing and ATS optimization service based in Noida, India.
We offer expert, hand-crafted ATS-optimized resumes, LinkedIn profile optimization, and a free AI-powered ATS resume score checker tool.

## Services
- ATS Resume Writing (Starting ₹499) — 100% hand-crafted, 16-point ATS optimization, 24hr delivery
- LinkedIn Profile Optimization (Starting ₹599) — Keyword-rich headline, summary, skills strategy
- Resume + LinkedIn Combo (Starting ₹899) — Best value, priority delivery, cover letter included

## Free Tools
- ATS Resume Score Checker: https://atsresumechecker.co.in/ats-checker.html
  16 crucial ATS checks, instant results, no login required, PDF/DOC/DOCX support

## Resume Templates
- 11 premium ATS resume designs across industries
- Industries covered: Creative, Healthcare, Engineering, Finance, Social Work, Hospitality, Sales, Interior Design, Logistics, MEP/Electrician, HR/Admin
- All templates: https://atsresumechecker.co.in/resume-samples.html
